title: neurolaena intermedia
intro: Neurolaena intermedia, also known as Mexican tea or false chamomile, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. The leaves and flowers of Neurolaena intermedia have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and relieving digestive issues. Neurolaena intermedia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe and calm the mind and body.
